query.sql:
SELECT
    TO_CHAR("createdAt", 'YYYY-MM') as month,
    SUM(completed_qty) as completed,
    SUM(defect_qty) as defects,
    ROUND(
        CASE WHEN SUM(completed_qty) > 0
        THEN (SUM(completed_qty) - SUM(defect_qty))::numeric / SUM(completed_qty) * 100
        ELSE 0 END, 1
    ) as yield_rate
FROM nb_erp_work_orders
WHERE completed_qty > 0
GROUP BY TO_CHAR("createdAt", 'YYYY-MM')
ORDER BY month
